nasb.text: and gave them this land, which You swore to their forefathers to give them, a land flowing with milk and honey.

esv.text: And you gave them this land, which you swore to their fathers to give them, a land flowing with milk and honey.

cnv.text: 你把這地賜給他們，就是你向他們列祖起誓，要賜給他們的流奶與蜜之地。

ccb.text: 你信守对他们祖先的应许，赐给他们这奶蜜之乡。
